name: Argent Ore Prospecting
description: Begin a hunt for Argent Ore or join a nearby hunt that's in progress. Argent ore can be used to make special jewelry and also gives a lot of experience when mined.
breadcrumb_found_message: You're closer to the precious metal!
breadcrumb_found_by_someone_else_message: You are able to follow someone else's trail
resource_uncovered_by_someone_else_messa: You are able to follow someone else's trail to the argent ore!

name: Search for Ancient Relic
description: Begin a hunt for Ancient Relics or join a nearby hunt that's in progress. Ancient Relics can be used to make research that grants the user a powerful, long lasting buff. Ancient Relics give a lot of experience when gathered.
breadcrumb_found_message: You've found a clue to lead you to some ancient artifacts.
resource_uncovered_message: You've uncovered debris and artifacts from the ancient times.
breadcrumb_found_by_someone_else_message: You are able to follow someone else's trail
resource_uncovered_by_someone_else_messa: You are able to follow someone else's trail ancient debris!

name: Present Hunt
description: Begin a hunt for a lost gift or join a nearby hunt that's in progress. Lost Gifts contain special holiday cloth to make decorations for your town or house. Can also contain holiday food or cosmetic clothing.
breadcrumb_found_message: You're one step closer to finding the gift!
breadcrumb_found_by_someone_else_message: You are able to follow someone else's trail
resource_uncovered_by_someone_else_messa: You are able to follow someone else's trail to the gift!

name: Berserker Mushroom Hunt
description: Begin a hunt for a Berserker Mushroom or join a nearby hunt that's in progress. Berserker Mushrooms can be used to make special potions that increase gathering or crafting speed. Berserker Mushrooms also give a lot of experience when gathered.
breadcrumb_found_message: You can smell the mushroom spores in the air.
breadcrumb_found_by_someone_else_message: You are able to follow someone else's trail
resource_uncovered_by_someone_else_messa: You are able to follow someone else's trail to the mushroom!
